emails.subject: Electrobolt Legal Risk Memo
emails.body: Electrobolt Legal Risk Memo Attached is the current draft. I'm sending this without talking to Lisa first but I'm pretty sure this is close to final. Please call either of us or Brian if you have any questions. Regards, John
